name: GWPBS22-IRF
scope: Engineering survey and topographic mapping for railway applications.
area: United Kingdom (UK) - on or related to the rail route from London (Paddington) to Swansea.
remarks: Intermediate CRS created in 2022 to assist the emulation of the ETRS89 / GWPBS22 SnakeGrid projected CRS through transformation ETRS89 to GWPBS22-IRF (1) (code 10210) used in conjunction with the GW22-LCC map projection (code 10211).
